tools.name: oj_capabilities
tools.description: Report the audited anonymous AtCoder read surface and explicitly unsupported operations.

tools.name: oj_health
tools.description: Report local readiness and the latest observed AtCoder page-read status without probing upstream.

tools.name: oj_fetch_problem
tools.description: Fetch one public problem statement from an exact contest/task pair or canonical atcoder.jp task URL. Returns sanitized HTML with preserved math, samples, limits, hashes, and source provenance.

tools.name: oj_search_problems
tools.description: Resolve exactly one contest/task id, atcoder:contest/task id, or canonical task URL. Free-text and catalog crawling are not supported.
